name: BMC Helix ITSM Platform API
what_it_does: Enterprise IT service management (ITSM) platform with REST API — providing incident management, change management, asset management, CMDB, service request management, and AI-powered service operations (AIOps) for large enterprises, as the successor to BMC Remedy with cloud delivery and predictive analytics.
use_cases: Creating and updating IT incidents programmatically via BMC Helix ITSM REST API
Managing CMDB (Configuration Management Database) assets and relationships via API
Integrating BMC Helix with monitoring tools for automated incident creation from alerts
Querying ticket status, SLA metrics, and assignment data for IT operations dashboards
Automating change management workflows and approval routing via Helix API
not_for: Small IT teams (BMC Helix is enterprise-scale — use Freshservice for SMB ITSM)
Simple helpdesk ticketing (use Zendesk or Freshdesk for simpler helpdesk needs)
Customer-facing support (Helix focuses on IT internal operations, not customer support)
best_when: A large enterprise IT organization needs comprehensive ITSM with deep CMDB, change management, and AIOps capabilities — especially if already running BMC Remedy and migrating to cloud ITSM.
avoid_when: You're an SMB, don't have dedicated ITSM administrators, need simple ticketing, or don't have the budget and complexity tolerance for enterprise ITSM platforms.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code and client credentials flows. HTTP Basic auth for legacy AR System (Remedy) integrations. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with role-based access. Webhook for ticket state changes and workflow events. REST API (Helix) and AR System API (legacy Remedy). Scoped by IT process (incident, change, asset, CMDB). SSO via SAML for enterprise access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise licensing; contact BMC sales; typically $200K-2M+/year
pricing.notes: Houston, TX company. Founded 1980. Privately held (KKR, Syntel acquisition 2018). $2B+ revenue. Largest dedicated ITSM software company. BMC Remedy was the original enterprise ITSM (founded 1988). BMC Helix is cloud-native successor to on-premises Remedy. 10,000+ enterprise customers including 80% of Fortune 500. AIOps via Helix Operations Management. CMDB is market-leading capability. Gartner Magic Quadrant leader for ITSM.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API (Helix) and legacy AR System API for incidents, changes, problems, assets, and CMDB. OAuth2 auth. Good but complex enterprise documentation. Two API systems: modern Helix REST API and legacy AR System API (for Remedy migrations). CMDB relationship management via CMDB API. Webhook for workflow events. Enterprise configuration required before API use.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Incident reads fully idempotent. CMDB reads idempotent. Incident creation not idempotent — use incident ID for updates. Change records use approval workflow — creation triggers approval, not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Two API systems: Helix REST (modern) and AR System REST (legacy Remedy) — choose based on deployment
CMDB configuration required before asset and CI management via API
Change management requires approval workflow — API creates change request, not instant change
FedRAMP authorization for US government — additional compliance setup
Enterprise licensing $200K-2M+ annually — significant implementation and migration effort

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP, HIPAA, GDPR compliant. Multi-region data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Enterprise ITSM data includes system configurations, vulnerabilities, and change records — highly sensitive. FedRAMP for US government deployments. CMDB contains full IT asset inventory — restrict API access strictly. On-premises Remedy option available for highest security requirements.
